diagrams.title: iostream Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the inheritance relationship between ios, istream, ostream, and iostream classes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding stream hierarchy and how manipulators work on streams

diagrams.title: Format Flags Organization
diagrams.description: Groups all format flags by their functional categories
diagrams.purpose: Visual reference for all available format flags and their groupings

diagrams.title: setw() Behavior
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how setw affects output with different fill characters and alignments
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that setw only affects the NEXT output operation

diagrams.title: Precision Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the difference between default precision, fixed precision, and scientific notation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how precision works in different modes
